name: Dutch Chocolate Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE CHOCOLATE AND CREAM IN THE TOP OF A DOUBLE-BOILER. HEAT SLOWLY TO MELT THE CHOCOLATE.
2. STIR IN BUTTER UNTIL MELTED and remove from heat, allowing it to cool.
3. COMBINE BEATEN EGG AND POWDERED SUGAR in a separate bowl.
4. BEAT IN THE CHOCOLATE MIXTURE in a thin, steady stream.
5. CHILL UNTIL FIRM.
6. MOLD INTO 1-INCH BALLS and roll in chocolate sprinkles.
7. PLACE INTO CANDY CUPS.
8. SERVE AT ROOM TEMPERATURE.
